project_type: React + Vite SPA with Tailwind CSS (mind-map/canvas application)
test_framework: None configured (no test runner in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map to verify the project compiles without errors. Since there are no tests configured, a successful build is the primary verification.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22 available. No test framework configured, so verification is build-only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in codebase.
key_patterns: The app is a large monolithic React component (App.jsx ~5590 lines). Side panels (TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx) are separate files. Panels use the pattern: state bool + toggle button in toolbar + conditional rendering in JSX alongside the main canvas. Data is stored in localStorage under 'nexus-app-state' as part of projects. Icons come from lucide-react. Tailwind CSS classes are used inline. No state management library - all useState/useCallback at top level. Auto-save uses debounced localStorage writes. Each panel follows: header with icon/title/close, search/filter bar, scrollable content area.
directory_structure: Root: index.html, package.json, vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js. src/: App.jsx (monolithic main component), MiniMap.jsx, TaskPanel.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, main.jsx (entry), index.css (tailwind directives). public/: vite.svg.
